description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve jacket and slim pants, both of which appear to be casual and suitable for everyday urban environments. Her shoes are flat and closed-toe, appropriate for walking on city streets or sidewalks. The figure has shoulder-length, wavy hair that frames her face and neck. The overall appearance is clean and modern, with no visible accessories or carried items. The clothing and posture suggest she is prepared for mild weather and typical city activities.
description: An adult female pedestrian in a fitted jacket and slim pants, standing upright with arms outstretched. She has shoulder-length wavy hair and wears flat, closed-toe shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, fitted jacket, slim pants, and flat shoes with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the jacket's fit, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, pants, and hair, with both arms fully extended.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile, arm extension, and the side silhouette of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual fitted jacket and slim pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
